Every Agent.
Every Machine.
One Terminal.

Not just Claude and Codex. Every agent you pay for — accessible from any device, across every machine you own.

Works with every agent you already use

ClaudeCursorAmpCodexDroidGeminiCopilot+ any CLI agent
terminal — zsh
~$npx lecoder-mconnect
LeSearch MConnect v1.0.2
Secure agent tunnel initializing...
[ok] Cloudflare tunnel active
[ok] SSH hardening: enabled
[ok] Agent isolation: sandbox
Scan to connect from any device:
mconnect://tun-a1b2c3.lesearch.ai
Waiting for connection...

The Problem

The Agent Setup Problem

01

Security is an afterthought

Most developers run agents with full system access, no isolation, and no monitoring. One compromised session means your entire machine is exposed.

02

Locked to one device

Your agent is running on your laptop. You close the lid. Work stops. There is no way to check in, course-correct, or hand off without being at your desk.

03

No unified view

Five agents, three machines, zero visibility into what is happening where. You are context-switching between SSH sessions, log files, and Slack threads.

Why LeSearch

Built for how power users actually work

Other tools connect one agent to one machine. LeSearch connects everything to everything — securely, from any device.

$npx lecoder-mconnect
One command. Any machine.
Feature
LeSearch AI
Others
Agents supported
7+ — any CLI agent
1–2 specific agents
Multi-machine
SSH + VNC + Headscale VPN
Single machine only
GUI access (VNC)
Full desktop view from phone
Terminal only
Open source
LeCoder — fully open, MIT
Archived or closed
Secure setup
Guided — SSH hardening + isolation
DIY, no guidance

How It Works

Four steps to full agent control

01

Set Up Securely

SSH hardening, agent isolation, proper credential scoping. One command gets you from zero to a production-grade agent environment. No security shortcuts.

npx lecoder-mconnect --setup
02

Connect from Anywhere

QR code pairing. No port forwarding. No VPN configuration. Cloudflare tunnel handles the routing. Open MConnect on your phone and scan.

Works on iOS — App Store pending
03

See Everything

Terminal and GUI access in one interface. SSH for shell access. VNC for desktop view. Full visibility into what every agent is doing on every machine.

SSH + VNC + Cloudflare
04

Orchestrate

Run multiple agents across machines. Monitor, control, and coordinate from any device. If something needs attention, you see it. If it can run unattended, it does.

Multi-machine agent control

Open Source

Built on Open Source

LeCoder is our open-source agent orchestration layer. Use it standalone or as the foundation for a full LeSearch AI setup.

LeCoder CLInpm
npx lecoder-mconnect

The core tunnel and terminal sharing layer. Creates a secure Cloudflare-backed tunnel from your machine to any device in seconds.

Open source · MIT

MConnect iOSApp Store
Terminal in your pocket

A real terminal on your iPhone. QR code pairing, no port forwarding required. Built specifically for agent orchestration, not repurposed from SSH clients.

App Store pending · TestFlight live

Voxmodel
Natural language to shell

A fine-tuned NL-to-shell model running locally on your machines. Tell your agent what you want in plain English. Vox handles the command translation.

Qwen3.5 fine-tune · Ollama compatible

github.com/aryateja2106/lecoder-mconnect

MIT license · Issues and PRs welcome

Star on GitHub

Architecture

How the routing works

Your devices connect through LeSearch Cloud routing, which maintains secure tunnels to all your machines. No direct exposure, no open ports.

Phone
MConnect iOS
Laptop
Browser / SSH
Tablet
Any device
LeSearch Cloud
Headscale VPNCloudflare TunnelSSH ProxyVNC Gateway
Raspberry Pi
Dallas, TX · 24/7
Server
Cloud / bare metal
Workstation
Home / office
No open ports
Cloudflare handles ingress
E2E encrypted
TLS everywhere
Zero config
QR code pairing
Agent-aware
